programme.title: Psychic Witness
programme.desc: Psychics help AR and CA families find missing sons, offering hope as time runs out.

programme.title: Killing John Lennon
programme.desc: Mark David Chapman, a disgruntled security guard, becomes obsessed with "The Catcher in the Rye"

programme.title: The CEO Killer: Deny, Defend, Depose
programme.desc: Brian Thompson's murder by a CEO sparks debate, revealing power, ambition, and a shocking manifesto.

programme.title: Killing John F. Kennedy
programme.desc: This investigation explores the life and career of John F. Kennedy, examining his assassination

programme.title: Out of Mind, Out of Sight
programme.desc: Follow the residents at Brockville Mental Health Centre, a hospital for those who’ve committed violent crimes.

programme.title: Catch My Killer
programme.desc: In 1967, Connie & Carolyn Hevener were murdered in a robbery; the killer remains free 4 years later.

programme.title: Catch My Killer
programme.desc: Donna Fowler vanishes, then Stacy Belcher; two families haunted by loss for over 20 years.

programme.title: Catch My Killer
programme.desc: In 1980, Marlene Major vanishes; her husband claims she ran, but the truth is far more sinister.

programme.title: Psychic Witness
programme.desc: Psychics help solve CA neighbor murders, OH missing man case, revealing shocking truths.

programme.title: Psychic Witness
programme.desc: Psychics uncover truth in OH roommate's death and LA teen's fate, revealing heartbreaking ends.

programme.title: Psychic Witness
programme.desc: Psychics aid Midwest disappearance and PA murder cases, guiding cops to killers through visions.

programme.title: Psychic Witness
programme.desc: Psychics aid CT murder and CA missing boy cases, offering visions but conflicting leads.

programme.title: Psychic Witness
programme.desc: Psychics help solve OH spike death and CA missing woman cases, guiding police to the truth.

programme.title: Aileen : Life and Death of a Serial killer
programme.desc: This documentary about serial killer Aileen Wuornos, focuses on her mental state when she was on death row.

programme.title: Looking For Mike
programme.desc: Filmmaker Dylan Reibling investigates the mysterious death of his friend, Michael De Bourcier.

programme.title: The Unsolved Killings Of Jack The Ripper
programme.desc: The 1888 Whitechapel murders by Jack the Ripper sparked fear and enduring mystery in East London.

programme.desc: Follow the residents at Brockville Mental Health Centre, a hospital for those who’ve committed violent crimes.

programme.title: Life and Death of Tupac Shakur, The
programme.desc: Tupac Shakur, a renowned hip-hop artist, transformed rap from a trend to a complex art form

programme.title: Who Killed Tupac Shakur?
programme.desc: After Tyson's fight in Vegas, Tupac and Suge clashed with rival Orlando Anderson, sparking violence.

programme.title: Catch My Killer
programme.desc: Marilyn Kananen, 65, disappears. Her children suspect their abusive father, gone for 15 years, has returned. Detectives find evidence that turns the case upside down.

programme.title: Catch My Killer
programme.desc: Heather Church's skull found 2 years post-abduction; clues lead to a prolific U.S. serial killer.

programme.title: Catch My Killer
programme.desc: Nearly two decades later, cold case detectives use new technology to solve Lisa Summers' murder.

programme.title: Behind Bars: The World's Toughest Prisons
programme.desc: A prison in the desert of Arizona uses old army tents instead of prison cells.

programme.title: Behind Bars: The World's Toughest Prisons
programme.desc: In a brutal prison, inmates dominate, while fearful guards stay outside; only the strongest survive.

programme.title: Behind Bars: The World's Toughest Prisons
programme.desc: Dallas County Jail, with 7,100 beds, houses diverse inmates and faces turf wars from 300 daily arrivals.

programme.title: Gang World
programme.desc: Going inside the most dangerous of motorcycle gangs, the Hells Angels.

programme.title: Prison Dogs
programme.desc: A groundbreaking programme allows prison inmates to care for and train puppies as service dogs.

programme.title: Code Of Silence - Trail Of Murder
programme.desc: A documentary about the Boston Bandits gang in the 1990’s known for armored car and bank robberies.
